article.title: Meta’s AI Spending Overshadows Addiction Lawsuits, Youth Bans
article.summary: Social media companies face backlash over safety of youth on their platforms

article.title: Tim Cook’s top Apple acquisitions mix hardware, software, and services
article.summary: Tim Cook’s Apple may have passed on buying Tesla, but the company sure has an interesting list of smaller companies it bought during the outgoing CEO’s tenure. Let’s stroll down Mergers and Acquisitions memory lane and revisit some of the top company takeovers during Tim Cook’s time at the top. more…
article.title_zh: Tim Cook 最重要的 Apple 收購混合硬件、軟件和服務
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Tim Cook 的 Apple 沒有收購 Tesla，但該公司在掌舵期間收購了許多小公司。讓我們回顧 Tim Cook 時代的一些重要收購案例。

article.title: The Next Alzheimer’s Breakthrough Will Take More Than Just Science
article.summary: At WIRED Health, pioneering Alzheimer's researcher John Hardy outlined the stakes—and next steps—of where treatment is headed next.
article.title_zh: 下一個阿茲海默症突破將需要不止於科學
article.summary_zh: 在 WIRED Health 大會上，開創性的阿茲海默症研究人員 John Hardy 概述了治療下一步發展的關鍵所在。

article.title: Senators ban themselves from prediction markets after candidates bet on own races
article.summary: US senators voted unanimously to ban themselves from making bets on prediction markets yesterday, about a week after Kalshi said it caught three congressional candidates betting on their own campaigns. The resolution to prohibit senators from trading on prediction markets passed yesterday by unanimous consent. The action amends the Senate's conflict-of-interest rules and does not require approval by the House of Representatives. The House has a pending resolution that would impose a similar rule on its own members. “United States Senators have no business engaging in speculative activities like prediction markets while collecting a taxpayer-funded paycheck, period,” said Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-Ohio), who introduced the resolution. “Serving in Congress should never be about finding new ways
article.title_zh: 參議員投票禁止自己參與預測市場後發現候選人對自己競選賭注
article.summary_zh: 美國參議員昨日全票通過決議禁止自己在預測市場中進行交易，此舉發生在 Kalshi 發現三名國會候選人對自己的競選投注一週後。

article.title: Minnesota passes ban on fake AI nudes; app makers risk $500K fines
article.summary: This week, Minnesota became the first state to pass a law banning nudification apps that make it easy to "undress" or sexualize images of real people. Under the law , developers of websites, apps, software, or other services designed to "nudify" images risk extensive damages, including punitive damages, if a victim decides to sue. Their offending products could also be blocked in the state. Additionally, Minnesota's attorney general could impose fines up to $500,000 per fake AI nude flagged. Any fines collected would be used to fund services for victims of "sexual assault, general crime, domestic violence, and child abuse," the law stipulates. On Wednesday, the Minnesota Senate unanimously voted 65–0 to pass the law. That vote came after the bill just as quickly passed in the House last we
article.title_zh: 明尼蘇達州禁止假 AI 裸照；應用開發者面臨 50 萬美元罰款
article.summary_zh: 本週明尼蘇達州成為首個禁止裸露應用的州，該應用可輕易將真人影像「脫衣」或性化；開發者面臨廣泛損害賠償，包括懲罰性賠償。

article.title: FCC votes to ban all Chinese labs from certifying electronics sold in the US due to national security concerns — ruling would affect 75 percent of US-bound devices
article.summary: The FCC estimates that roughly 75% of all U.S.-bound electronics are currently tested in Chinese facilities.
article.title_zh: FCC投票禁止所有中國實驗室認證在美銷售的電子產品——該裁決將影響75%的美國進口設備
article.summary_zh: FCC估計，目前約75%的美國進口電子產品在中國設施中進行測試。

article.title: What You Need to Know About the Foreign-Made Router Ban in the US
article.summary: The FCC banned the sale of new consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers and mobile hot spots manufactured outside the US. Here’s what it means for you.
article.title_zh: 您需要了解的美國外製路由器禁令信息
article.summary_zh: 美國 FCC 禁止銷售在美國以外製造的新型消費級 Wi-Fi 路由器和行動熱點。了解這對您的影響。

article.title: Huawei could seize China’s AI chip crown in 2026 as Nvidia's H200 shipments stall in regulatory limbo — Beijing pushes homegrown AI hardware dominance in a market projected to hit $67 billion by 2030
article.summary: Huawei is reportedly on track to become China’s top AI chip supplier as Nvidia faces export restrictions and customs delays. Analysts forecast China’s domestic AI chip market could hit $67 billion by 2030.
article.title_zh: 華為有望在 2026 年奪得中國 AI 芯片桂冠，Nvidia H200 出貨陷入監管困境——北京推動自主 AI 硬件主導，市場預計到 2030 年將達 670 億美元
article.summary_zh: 隨著 Nvidia 面臨出口限制和海關延誤，華為有望成為中國頂級 AI 芯片供應商；分析師預測中國國產 AI 芯片市場到 2030 年可能達到 670 億美元。

article.title: Mistral, Europe’s answer to OpenAI and Anthropic, pushes its coding agents to the cloud
article.summary: Countless companies are capitalizing on the AI boom, building everything from coding assistants to customer support bots. But only a handful are building the foundational AI models themselves — the underlying systems that power it all. That group is dominated largely by OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, with the likes of Mistral AI sitting just outside that elite circle. Founded out of Paris in 2023, Mistral has raised billions from a who’s who of investors, including Microsoft and Nvidia , all while pushing a more open approach — releasing open-weight models and giving developers more control over how they run them. On Wednesday, Mistral debuted a new model, Mistral Medium 3.5, alongside a system that lets its coding agents run in the cloud. Now, the company is edging towar
article.title_zh: Mistral，歐洲對抗 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的答案，將其編程代理推向雲端
article.summary_zh: 無數公司正在利用 AI 熱潮，開發從編程助手到客戶支持機器人的各種應用。但只有少數公司在構建基礎 AI 模型本身，而這個領域主要由 OpenAI、Anthropic 等公司主導。

article.title: Talent over tokens: AI models are becoming more expensive to run, and productivity gains are limited — efficient workers might be the solution to strained budgets
article.summary: Major firms are finding the rising costs of AI hard to manage, as human workers are now often more affordable alternatives to AI within certain contexts. With many platforms switching to per-token billing and rising model costs, we may be reaching an inflection point where human workers are a more efficient way to spend.
article.title_zh: 人才優於代幣：AI 模型運行成本日益高昂，生產力收益有限——高效率工作者可能是解決預算壓力的方案
article.summary_zh: 主要科技公司發現 AI 成本上升難以管理，人類員工在許多情境下已成為比 AI 更經濟實惠的替代方案。隨著許多平台轉向按代幣計費，AI 成本不斷上升，人類員工可能正成為更具成本效益的選擇。

article.title: The rumored 20th anniversary iPhone design will be applied to both Pro models
article.summary: Next year the original iPhone turns 20 - or rather, it's the 20th anniversary of its launch, as we doubt any units are still around. Apple has long been rumored to be planning something special to mark the occasion, and a few days ago a report talked about a 20th anniversary iPhone coming with a quad-curved screen. As it turns out, that won't be a special anniversary iPhone model - instead, that rumor was actually talking about a redesign coming to the Pro series. So the iPhone Pro and Pro Max released in 2027 will have that quad-curved screen design, which Chinese smartphone makers had...
article.title_zh: 傳聞中的 20 週年 iPhone 設計將應用於兩款 Pro 型號
article.summary_zh: 明年原始 iPhone 將迎來 20 週年。Apple 傳聞計畫推出四曲屏幕的特別設計來紀念這一時刻。

article.title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Company to Help Build Humanoid Technology
article.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup developing artificial intelligence models for robots, as part of a major initiative to build humanoid technology.
article.title_zh: Meta 收購機器人 AI 公司以幫助構建類人機器人技術
article.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 已收購開發機器人人工智慧模型的新創公司 Assured Robot Intelligence，作為構建類人機器人技術重大計畫的一部分。

article.title: Next year’s iPhone Pro models could get all-new design, quad-curved display
article.summary: Apple is rumored to have a special 20th anniversary iPhone coming next year, but according to a new report, this won’t be a standalone new model, but rather an all-new design for the iPhone Pro line. more…
article.title_zh: 明年 iPhone Pro 型號可能採用全新設計和四曲屏幕
article.summary_zh: 雖然傳聞 Apple 計畫推出 20 週年特別款 iPhone，但新報告指出這將是 iPhone Pro 系列的全新設計，而非獨立新型號。

article.title: Google just dropped a new ‘experimental AI assistant’ app exclusively for Android (Updated)
article.summary: TL;DR Google just published a mysterious new ‘COSMO’ app to the Play Store. COSMO is equipped with a Gemini Nano model in addition to server-side AI, and feels designed for developmental purposes. The app listing is quite rough and may suggest this was published prematurely. Update, May 1, 2026 (2:31 PM ET): Well, we may have been closer to the mark than we realized with that “not quite ready for prime time” observation, because Google just pulled COSMO’s Play Store listing. We can still view the page when logged in with accounts that have already installed COSMO, but everyone else is getting a “not found” message. Original article, May 1, 2026 (1:44 PM ET): Google isn’t exactly shy about giving us access to its latest AI experiments. When it’s not deploying updated Gemini models for us to
article.title_zh: Google 剛推出專為 Android 的新「實驗性 AI 助手」應用（更新）
article.summary_zh: Google 發布神祕新應用「COSMO」到 Play Store。COSMO 配備 Gemini Nano 模型和伺服器端 AI，似乎為開發目的而設計。

article.title: Meta Solved Their Problem With Kenyan Contractors Seeing Footage of AI Glasses Wearers on the Toilet

article.title: HPE intros rugged edge servers – as defense and industry drive AI, 5G, IoT
article.summary: Theme of the week: edge computing and private networks for physical AI and AI inference in industrial and military zones. HPE has released a new AI server platform, ruggedized and optimized for difficult edge deployments; the release follows this week’s…
article.title_zh: HPE 推出堅固型邊緣伺服器 – 應對國防和產業推動的 AI、5G、IoT
article.summary_zh: HPE 發布新的 AI 伺服器平台，針對惡劣邊緣部署進行了強化和最佳化，以滿足實體 AI 和工業及軍事區域中 AI 推理的需求。

article.title: AI agents are running wild on developer machines. Incredibuild has a fix.
article.summary: Somewhere out there, a developer is walking around with their laptop half-open, so their AI coding agent doesn’t die. That’s the state of enterprise AI development in 2026 — and the problem Incredibuild is trying to fix with Islo, a sandbox that gives every agent its own persistent, isolated cloud environment. The company, best known for its build acceleration platform used by Microsoft, Take-Two, and Nintendo, has announced Islo, a sandbox purpose-built for AI coding agents . The goal is to give every agent its own dedicated, isolated cloud environment, governed by explicit policies, so engineering teams can run agents continuously without the security and governance headaches that come with letting them loose on developer machines or unmanaged infrastructure. Agents don
article.title_zh: AI agents 在開發者機器上失控。Incredibuild 有解決方案。
article.summary_zh: 開發者需要讓筆記型電腦保持半開啟狀態，以防止 AI 編程代理停止運作，這反映了 2026 年企業 AI 開發的現狀。Incredibuild 推出 Islo 沙箱來解決此問題，為每個代理提供獨立的持久環境。
